title: ProtonationAnalysis
description: Per-residue protonation analysis emitted by StructurePrep when protonation_policy=propka. The Topology agent consumes this to set per-residue pdb2gmx -inter answers based on each residue's predicted pKa vs. the configured pH.

method.description: How the per-residue states were derived.

pka_value.description: Predicted pKa. PROPKA emits 99.99 for non-titratable groups (e.g. CYS in a disulfide bond).

predicted_protonated.description: True iff pKa > ph_assumed (the group prefers to hold its proton).
